title: OpenAI Recognizer Options
description: OpenAI Whisper/Realtime specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'openai'.

apiKey.description: OpenAI API key. Overrides credentials configured in jambonz.

prompt.description: Prompt to guide the recognition model.

hintsTemplate.description: Template for injecting hints into the prompt.

turn_detection.description: Turn detection configuration for the OpenAI Realtime API.

eagerness.description: How eagerly the model should respond.

prefix_padding_ms.description: Milliseconds of audio to include before detected speech.

silence_duration_ms.description: Milliseconds of silence to detect end of speech.
